```{r mutation_similarity_betweenStages_merge_pipeline, eval=FALSE}
AML_scATA_CSM_REL_list <- lapply(AML_scATA_CSM_list, function(df) {
  df[grep("REL", rownames(df)), , drop = FALSE]
})
AML_scATA_CSM_REL_list <- Filter(function(x) nrow(x) > 0, AML_scATA_CSM_REL_list)

HSPC <- c("HSC", "Progenitor")
Myeloid <- c("GMP", "Monocytes", "CD16.Monocytes", "cDC", "pDC")
Lymphoid <- c("CLP", "Pre.B.Cell", "B.Cell", "CD4.Naive", "CD4.Memory", "CD8.Naive", "CD8.Memory", "CD8.Effector", "NK")
Erythroid_Basophil <- c("Early.Erythrocyte", "Late.Erythrocyte")
Other <- c("Early.Basophil", "Plasma")

AML_scRNA_meta <- AML_scRNA_meta %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    maincelltype = case_when(
      Classified_Celltype %in% HSPC ~ "HSPC",
      Classified_Celltype %in% Myeloid ~ "Myeloid",
      Classified_Celltype %in% Lymphoid ~ "Lymphoid",
      Classified_Celltype %in% Erythroid_Basophil ~ "Erythroid",
      Classified_Celltype %in% Other ~ "Other",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

AML_scATA_meta <- AML_scATA_meta %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    maincelltype = case_when(
      predictedGroup_Un %in% HSPC ~ "HSPC",
      predictedGroup_Un %in% Myeloid ~ "Myeloid",
      predictedGroup_Un %in% Lymphoid ~ "Lymphoid",
      predictedGroup_Un %in% Erythroid_Basophil ~ "Erythroid",
      predictedGroup_Un %in% Other ~ "Other",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

AML_scATA_meta$Classified_Celltype <- AML_scATA_meta$predictedGroup_Un

maincelltypes <- c("HSPC", "Myeloid", "Lymphoid", "Erythroid", "Other")
subcelltypes <- c(HSPC, Myeloid, Lymphoid, Erythroid_Basophil, Other)

AML_scRNA_meta_DX <- AML_scRNA_meta %>%
  dplyr::filter(grepl("DX", Library_ID))

AML_scRNA_meta_REL <- AML_scRNA_meta %>%
  dplyr::filter(grepl("REL", Library_ID))

AML_scATA_meta_DX <- AML_scATA_meta %>%
  dplyr::filter(grepl("DX", Sample))

AML_scATA_meta_REL <- AML_scATA_meta %>%
  dplyr::filter(grepl("REL", Sample))

AML_scRNA_meta_DX$Classified_CelltypeQ <- paste(AML_scRNA_meta_DX$Classified_Celltype, "DX", sep = "_")
AML_scRNA_meta_REL$Classified_CelltypeQ <- paste(AML_scRNA_meta_REL$Classified_Celltype, "REL", sep = "_")
AML_scRNA_meta_DX$maincelltypeQ <- paste(AML_scRNA_meta_DX$maincelltype, "DX", sep = "_")
AML_scRNA_meta_REL$maincelltypeQ <- paste(AML_scRNA_meta_REL$maincelltype, "REL", sep = "_")

AML_scATA_meta_DX$Classified_CelltypeQ <- paste(AML_scATA_meta_DX$Classified_Celltype, "DX", sep = "_")
AML_scATA_meta_REL$Classified_CelltypeQ <- paste(AML_scATA_meta_REL$Classified_Celltype, "REL", sep = "_")
AML_scATA_meta_DX$maincelltypeQ <- paste(AML_scATA_meta_DX$maincelltype, "DX", sep = "_")
AML_scATA_meta_REL$maincelltypeQ <- paste(AML_scATA_meta_REL$maincelltype, "REL", sep = "_")

AML_scRNA_meta_DX_REL <- rbind(AML_scRNA_meta_DX, AML_scRNA_meta_REL)
AML_scATA_meta_DX_REL <- rbind(AML_scATA_meta_DX, AML_scATA_meta_REL)

selected_samples_id <- c("AML4","AML11", "AML16",  "AML17", "AML18", "AML24")
# scRNA
AML_scRNA_CSM_DX_select_list <- AML_scRNA_CSM_DX_list[names(AML_scRNA_CSM_DX_list) %in% selected_samples_id]
names(AML_scRNA_CSM_DX_select_list) <- paste(selected_samples_id, "DX", sep = "_")
AML_scRNA_CSM_REL_select_list <- AML_scRNA_CSM_REL_list[names(AML_scRNA_CSM_REL_list) %in% selected_samples_id]
names(AML_scRNA_CSM_REL_select_list) <- paste(selected_samples_id, "REL", sep = "_")
AML_scRNA_CSM_DX_REL_select_list <- c(AML_scRNA_CSM_DX_select_list, AML_scRNA_CSM_REL_select_list)

# scATA
AML_scATA_CSM_DX_select_list <- AML_scATA_CSM_DX_list[names(AML_scATA_CSM_DX_list) %in% selected_samples_id]
names(AML_scATA_CSM_DX_select_list) <- paste(selected_samples_id, "DX", sep = "_")
AML_scATA_CSM_REL_select_list <- AML_scATA_CSM_REL_list[names(AML_scATA_CSM_REL_list) %in% selected_samples_id]
names(AML_scATA_CSM_REL_select_list) <- paste(selected_samples_id, "REL", sep = "_")
AML_scATA_CSM_DX_REL_select_list <- c(AML_scATA_CSM_DX_select_list, AML_scATA_CSM_REL_select_list)

data_mutationCelltype_mutSites_scRNA_byStage <- get_scRNA_mutSites_byStages(AML_scRNA_CSM_DX_REL_select_list, AML_scRNA_meta_DX_REL)
data_mutationCelltype_mutSites_scATA_byStage <- get_scATA_mutSites_byStages(AML_scATA_CSM_DX_REL_select_list, AML_scATA_meta_DX_REL)

data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scRNA_byStage_list <- list()
data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scATA_byStage_list <- list()
common_sample_pairs <- selected_samples_id
common_sample_stages <- c("DX", "REL")
ct_forComparision <- subcelltypes

for (sample in common_sample_pairs){
  message(sample)
  row_col_data_Names <- c(paste(ct_forComparision, "DX", sep = "_"), paste(ct_forComparision, "REL", sep = "_"))
  mut_cellTypeAnn_similarity <- as.data.frame(matrix(data = 0, nrow = length(row_col_data_Names), 
                                                    ncol = length(row_col_data_Names)))
  rownames(mut_cellTypeAnn_similarity) <- row_col_data_Names
  colnames(mut_cellTypeAnn_similarity) <- row_col_data_Names
  for (i in 1:nrow(mut_cellTypeAnn_similarity)){
    ct_stage_i <- rownames(mut_cellTypeAnn_similarity)[i]
    ct_i <- strsplit(ct_stage_i, "_")[[1]][1]
    stage_i <- strsplit(ct_stage_i, "_")[[1]][2]
    mut_site_i <- data_mutationCelltype_mutSites_scRNA_byStage[[paste(sample, stage_i, sep = "_")]][[ct_i]]
    for (j in 1:ncol(mut_cellTypeAnn_similarity)){
      ct_stage_j <- colnames(mut_cellTypeAnn_similarity)[j]
      ct_j <- strsplit(ct_stage_j, "_")[[1]][1]
      stage_j <- strsplit(ct_stage_j, "_")[[1]][2]
      mut_site_j <- data_mutationCelltype_mutSites_scRNA_byStage[[paste(sample, stage_j, sep = "_")]][[ct_j]]
      similarity_score <- ifelse(
        length(unique(c(mut_site_i, mut_site_j))) == 0,
        0,
        length(unique(intersect(mut_site_i, mut_site_j))) / length(unique(c(mut_site_i, mut_site_j)))
      )
      if (length(mut_site_i) == 1 | length(mut_site_j) == 1){
        similarity_score <- 0
      }
      
      mut_cellTypeAnn_similarity[i, j] <- similarity_score
    }
  }
  data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scRNA_byStage_list[[sample]] <- mut_cellTypeAnn_similarity
}

for (sample in common_sample_pairs){
  message(sample)
  row_col_data_Names <- c(paste(ct_forComparision, "DX", sep = "_"), paste(ct_forComparision, "REL", sep = "_"))
  mut_cellTypeAnn_similarity <- as.data.frame(matrix(data = 0, nrow = length(row_col_data_Names), 
                                                    ncol = length(row_col_data_Names)))
  rownames(mut_cellTypeAnn_similarity) <- row_col_data_Names
  colnames(mut_cellTypeAnn_similarity) <- row_col_data_Names
  for (i in 1:nrow(mut_cellTypeAnn_similarity)){
    ct_stage_i <- rownames(mut_cellTypeAnn_similarity)[i]
    ct_i <- strsplit(ct_stage_i, "_")[[1]][1]
    stage_i <- strsplit(ct_stage_i, "_")[[1]][2]
    mut_site_i <- data_mutationCelltype_mutSites_scATA_byStage[[paste(sample, stage_i, sep = "_")]][[ct_i]]
    for (j in 1:ncol(mut_cellTypeAnn_similarity)){
      ct_stage_j <- colnames(mut_cellTypeAnn_similarity)[j]
      ct_j <- strsplit(ct_stage_j, "_")[[1]][1]
      stage_j <- strsplit(ct_stage_j, "_")[[1]][2]
      mut_site_j <- data_mutationCelltype_mutSites_scATA_byStage[[paste(sample, stage_j, sep = "_")]][[ct_j]]
      similarity_score <- ifelse(
        length(unique(c(mut_site_i, mut_site_j))) == 0,
        0,
        length(unique(intersect(mut_site_i, mut_site_j))) / length(unique(c(mut_site_i, mut_site_j)))
      )
      if (length(mut_site_i) == 1 | length(mut_site_j) == 1){
        similarity_score <- 0
      }
      mut_cellTypeAnn_similarity[i, j] <- similarity_score
    }
  }
  data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scATA_byStage_list[[sample]] <- mut_cellTypeAnn_similarity
}
```
